---
title: "Python bindings to compiled languages"
---

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include python_extension_modules.qmd >}}

{{< include pybind.qmd >}}

<!-- {{< include fortran.qmd >}} -->

{{< include outro.qmd >}}

## Try style (remove in final presentation) {visibility="hidden"}

### Section heading

This is ordinary text

```cpp
int main() {
    std::cout << "Hello, world!" << std::endl;
    return 0;
}
```

more test
